commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Now Pashhur the son of Immer the priest, who was also chief officer in the house of the LORD, heard that Jeremiah prophesied these things. Son, or descendant. His father was Melchia, chap. , and 1 Paralipomenon ix. (Calmet) Chief: high priest, (Theodoret) or rather a chief officer, (chap. ) or prince, (Matthew xxvi. ; Grotius) whose duty it was to take up impostors. He treated Jeremias in this light. (Calmet) See Luke xxii.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
